examples.title: Greedy Layerwise Training
examples.description: A pseudocode example of how Greedy Layerwise Training works.
examples.code:
FOR each layer in the neural network
  TRAIN the layer using unsupervised learning
  FINE-TUNE the entire network using backpropagation
examples.explanation: This pseudocode example illustrates the basic idea behind Greedy Layerwise Training.
